sqlMap.select:
/*PledgeReport4.selectPledgeGuGunList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합 계' ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , T.LOC_GOV_NMS AS LOC_GOV_NMS FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT2 + A.FRSC_AMT3 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 + A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z2.LOC_GOV_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z1 , TB_LOCALGOV Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.LOCAL_GOV_CD = Z1.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND Z2.UP_LOCAL_GOV_CD = '6260000' AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.CHECK_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY Z2.LINE_UP_NO ) , '') AS LOC_GOV_NMS FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1) AS DGR_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, A.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , E.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_PLEDGE E , TB_PLEDGEBIZ F , TB_PLEDGEBIZ G , TB_PLEDGEBIZ H , TB_PLEDGEINFO I WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd#
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100'
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD <> '100'
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND I.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AND I.DEL_YN = 'N' AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = G.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND H.DEL_YN = 'N' AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = F.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND G.DEL_YN = 'N' AND F.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' AND F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId1#
AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId2#
AND E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT020_D Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.CHECK_YN = 'Y' ) AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' ) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)

THEN T.LOC_GOV_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.LOC_GOV_NM AS LOC_GOV_NM , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG1 || '-' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG2 || '-' || T.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS AS CHILD_CNT , NVL((SELECT Z.LOC_GOV_NM FROM TB_LOCALGOV Z WHERE Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS LOC_GOV_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.LINE_UP_NO FROM TB_LOCALGOV Z WHERE Z.LOCAL_GOV_CD = A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS LOC_GOV_RANK , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || '000' || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AS LOCAL_GOV_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1) AS DGR_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, A.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , MAX(A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG1) AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG1 , MAX(A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG2) AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG2 , MAX(A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG) AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', 1, 0), 1)) AS CHILD_CNT FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.COMPO_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD , J.LOCAL_GOV_CD , E.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , H.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG1 , G.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG2 , F.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG AS PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_PLEDGE E , TB_PLEDGEBIZ F , TB_PLEDGEBIZ G , TB_PLEDGEBIZ H , TB_PLEDGEINFO I , (SELECT JJ.FIS_YEAR , JJ.BGT_DGR , JJ.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , JJ.LOCAL_GOV_CD FROM TB_REPORT020_D JJ WHERE 1 = 1 AND JJ.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND JJ.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND JJ.CHECK_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY JJ.FIS_YEAR , JJ.BGT_DGR , JJ.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , JJ.LOCAL_GOV_CD ) J WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd#
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100'
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD <> '100'
AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND I.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AND I.DEL_YN = 'N' AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = G.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND H.DEL_YN = 'N' AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = F.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND G.DEL_YN = 'N' AND J.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND J.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND J.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND F.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' AND F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId1#
AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId2#
AND E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' ) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 2) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.LOCAL_GOV_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.LOC_GOV_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)
